name: Verify that user is able to navigate to Graph Representations page
fullName: features/graph.feature#Verify that user is able to navigate to Graph Representations page

steps.name: Given The user is on the "Graph" page
When The user clicks "Graph Representations" link
Then The user should be redirected to "Graph Representations" page
